{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Java Developer",
  "description": "Renmoney - We are a passionate team determined to challenge the status quo and make financial inclusion count for the millions of under-banked individuals and small business owners in Nigeria. We provide loans, savings, and fixed deposit solutions to our customers. Our vision is to be the most convenient lending company, delivering outstanding service experiences.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Java Developer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

The Role&nbsp;


	The Java Developer will join one of our core engineering teams Banking, Loans, Core Technology Platform, or Cards to design, develop, and maintain the backend systems that power our financial products and internal platforms.&nbsp;
	This role is ideal for a software engineer who is passionate about backend development, software craftsmanship, and building scalable, high-performance systems. You&#39;ll work alongside talented engineers in a collaborative environment that values clean architecture, code quality, testing, observability, and continuous improvement.&nbsp;


What You Will Do&nbsp;


	Design, develop, test, and maintain backend applications using Java and Spring Boot.&nbsp;
	Build scalable, secure, and high-performing backend services that support business-critical financial products.&nbsp;
	Develop and maintain RESTful APIs and microservices.&nbsp;
	Write clean, maintainable, and production-ready code with a strong focus on reliability and performance.&nbsp;
	Collaborate with Product, Engineering, Infrastructure, and QA teams throughout the software development lifecycle.&nbsp;
	Participate in architecture discussions, code reviews, and technical design sessions.&nbsp;
	Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize application performance.&nbsp;
	Build and support distributed systems using modern cloud-native technologies.&nbsp;
	Implement messaging and event-driven solutions using Kafka.&nbsp;
	Contribute to engineering best practices, automated testing, and continuous improvement initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related discipline.&nbsp;
	Proven experience developing backend applications using Java.&nbsp;
	Strong experience with Spring Boot or similar Java frameworks.&nbsp;
	Experience building and maintaining distributed systems in production environments.&nbsp;
	Experience working in cloud-native environments is highly desirable.&nbsp;
	Experience in FinTech, banking, payments, lending, or other financial services is an added advantage.&nbsp;


Professional Competencies:


	Strong proficiency in Java.&nbsp;
	Solid experience with Spring Boot.&nbsp;
	Experience developing RESTful APIs and microservices.&nbsp;
	Working knowledge of AWS, preferably Amazon EKS.&nbsp;
	Experience with MySQL or other relational databases.&nbsp;
	Experience with Kafka and event-driven architectures.&nbsp;
	Knowledge of Redis caching technologies.&nbsp;
	Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools such as Grafana and Prometheus.&nbsp;
	Understanding of software design principles, testing methodologies, and engineering best practices.&nbsp;
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.&nbsp;


&bull; Excellent communication and collaboration skills.&nbsp;

This Role Is Ideal For You If:&nbsp;


	You enjoy building scalable backend systems.&nbsp;
	You take pride in writing clean, maintainable, and well-tested code.&nbsp;
	You are passionate about software engineering best practices and continuous improvement.&nbsp;
	You enjoy solving complex technical problems.&nbsp;
	You thrive in collaborative, fast-paced engineering teams.&nbsp;
	You are excited by the opportunity to build products that power millions of financial transactions.&nbsp;


You May Not Enjoy This Role If:&nbsp;


	You prefer front-end or UI-focused development.&nbsp;
	You are uncomfortable working with distributed systems and cloud technologies.&nbsp;
	You dislike code reviews, testing, or maintaining production systems.&nbsp;
	You prefer highly isolated work with minimal collaboration.&nbsp;
	You are not interested in building reliable, scalable software.


Benefits


	Opportunity to work in an innovative fintech company with a global reach.&nbsp;
	Exposure to modern technologies including Java, Spring Boot, AWS (EKS), MySQL, Kafka, Redis, Grafana, and Prometheus.&nbsp;
	Opportunity to contribute to high-impact financial products used by millions of customers.&nbsp;
	Collaborative engineering culture focused on technical excellence and continuous learning.&nbsp;
	Engaging technical challenges with opportunities to influence product development.&nbsp;
	Professional growth within a globally distributed engineering team.&nbsp;
	Competitive compensation and excellent career development opportunities.&nbsp;
",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-14",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-15",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Java Developer Job at Renmoney




        
    

        
        Renmoney - We are a passionate team determined to challenge the status quo and make financial inclusion count for the millions of under-banked individuals and small business owners in Nigeria. We provide loans, savings, and fixed deposit solutions to our customers. Our vision is to be the most convenient lending company, delivering outstanding service experiences.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Java Developer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

The Role 
     

            
    




	The Java Developer will join one of our core engineering teams Banking, Loans, Core Technology Platform, or Cards to design, develop, and maintain the backend systems that power our financial products and internal platforms. 
	This role is ideal for a software engineer who is passionate about backend development, software craftsmanship, and building scalable, high-performance systems. You'll work alongside talented engineers in a collaborative environment that values clean architecture, code quality, testing, observability, and continuous improvement. 


What You Will Do 


	Design, develop, test, and maintain backend applications using Java and Spring Boot. 
	Build scalable, secure, and high-performing backend services that support business-critical financial products. 
	Develop and maintain RESTful APIs and microservices. 
	Write clean, maintainable, and production-ready code with a strong focus on reliability and performance. 
	Collaborate with Product, Engineering, Infrastructure, and QA teams throughout the software development lifecycle. 
	Participate in architecture discussions, code reviews, and technical design sessions. 
	Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize application performance. 
	Build and support distributed systems using modern cloud-native technologies. 
	Implement messaging and event-driven solutions using Kafka. 
	Contribute to engineering best practices, automated testing, and continuous improvement initiatives.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related discipline. 
	Proven experience developing backend applications using Java. 
	Strong experience with Spring Boot or similar Java frameworks. 
	Experience building and maintaining distributed systems in production environments. 
	Experience working in cloud-native environments is highly desirable. 
	Experience in FinTech, banking, payments, lending, or other financial services is an added advantage. 


Professional Competencies:


	Strong proficiency in Java. 
	Solid experience with Spring Boot. 
	Experience developing RESTful APIs and microservices. 
	Working knowledge of AWS, preferably Amazon EKS. 
	Experience with MySQL or other relational databases. 
	Experience with Kafka and event-driven architectures. 
	Knowledge of Redis caching technologies. 
	Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools such as Grafana and Prometheus. 
	Understanding of software design principles, testing methodologies, and engineering best practices. 
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. 


• Excellent communication and collaboration skills. 

This Role Is Ideal For You If: 


	You enjoy building scalable backend systems. 
	You take pride in writing clean, maintainable, and well-tested code. 
	You are passionate about software engineering best practices and continuous improvement. 
	You enjoy solving complex technical problems. 
	You thrive in collaborative, fast-paced engineering teams. 
	You are excited by the opportunity to build products that power millions of financial transactions. 


You May Not Enjoy This Role If: 


	You prefer front-end or UI-focused development. 
	You are uncomfortable working with distributed systems and cloud technologies. 
	You dislike code reviews, testing, or maintaining production systems. 
	You prefer highly isolated work with minimal collaboration. 
	You are not interested in building reliable, scalable software.


Benefits


	Opportunity to work in an innovative fintech company with a global reach. 
	Exposure to modern technologies including Java, Spring Boot, AWS (EKS), MySQL, Kafka, Redis, Grafana, and Prometheus. 
	Opportunity to contribute to high-impact financial products used by millions of customers. 
	Collaborative engineering culture focused on technical excellence and continuous learning. 
	Engaging technical challenges with opportunities to influence product development. 
	Professional growth within a globally distributed engineering team. 
	Competitive compensation and excellent career development opportunities. 
    

    

        Click here to Apply

&nbsp;Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Igbo Efon, Lagos

Key Responsibilities

	Develop SEO strategies and improve website performance.
	Manage email marketing and lead nurturing campaigns.
	Monitor campaign analytics and prepare monthly performance reports.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in digital marketing.
	Hands-on experience with Meta Ads, Google Ads, Google Analytics, and SEO.
	Strong understanding of content marketing and lead generation.
	Excellent analytical, communication, and project management skills.


Method of Application

Digital Marketer Job at Pella Group




        
    

        
        Pella Group - We're into real estate development, metal & stainless steel, aluminium & glass works founded in 2006 and headquartered in Lagos, Nigeria. The company specializes in real estate development, property investment, facility management, construction, and architectural finishing solutions. Through its subsidiaries, Pella Homes and Pella Global Services, it delivers residential and commercial property development, metal fabrication, aluminium and glass works, stainless steel installations, automated gates, and other building finishing services.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below: 

 Job Position: Digital Marketer
     

            
    



Job Location: Igbo Efon, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Plan and execute digital marketing campaigns across Meta, Google, TikTok, LinkedIn, and other platforms.
	Manage paid advertising campaigns and optimize for leads and conversions.
	Develop SEO strategies and improve website performance.
	Manage email marketing and lead nurturing campaigns.
	Monitor campaign analytics and prepare monthly performance reports.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in digital marketing.
	Hands-on experience with Meta Ads, Google Ads, Google Analytics, and SEO.
	Strong understanding of content marketing and lead generation.
	Excellent analytical, communication, and project management skills.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolio to: [email protected] using "Digital Marketer Application" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Tax Accountant Job at Isichei Farms Limited




        
    

        
        Isichei Farms Limited, a leading player in the agricultural and feed milling industry, is  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Tax Accountant

Job Location: Oghara, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Prepare and file accurate and timely tax returns (CIT, VAT, WHT, PAYE, etc.)
	Ensure compliance with all relevant tax laws and regulations
	Liaise with tax authorities (e.g., Federal Inland Revenue Service, State Internal Revenue Services)
	Monitor changes in tax legislation and advise Management accordingly
	Conduct tax planning and optimization to minimize liabilities
	Handle tax audits, queries, and reconciliations
	Maintain proper documentation of all tax transactions
	Support financial reporting and audit processes


Requirements


	Minimum of HND/B.Sc. in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	 3–5 years of experience in tax accounting.
	Professional qualification (ICAN / ACCA) is mandatory.
	Strong knowledge of Nigerian tax laws and compliance requirements.
	Experience dealing with regulatory authorities.
	Proficiency in Excel and accounting software/ERP systems.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Strong integrity and confidentiality
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using Job Position as the subject if the mail.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accounts / Admin Officer",
  "description": "Intersect Consortium is a group of organizations primarily working in the mental health and addiction space. Our members understand the growing need for mental health services and products in Africa and continually work to provide awareness, education, treatment, and support to individuals, companies, families, and society at large.&nbsp;

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Accounts / Admin Officer

Job Location: Makurdi, Benue
Employment Type: Full-time

Roles and Responsibilities


	Assist the Finance team in maintaining the accounting systems, processes, and procedures
	Ensure financial records meet regulations and Tax Compliance
	Support year-end audit process and financial accounting work
	Deliver timely and high-quality month-end management accounts including a KPI pack.
	Produce weekly financial management information promptly as required by senior management.
	Maintain and reconcile fixed asset registers, prepayments, accruals, and other accounting schedules.
	Bank reconciliations, monitoring petty cash, foreign cash, and credit cards, including reconciliations
	Preparation and submission of monthly VAT, withholding tax, Pension, and other statutory returns.
	Monthly payroll
	Provide transactional support for purchase and&nbsp;sales ledger when required
	Debt control and management
	Budgeting and budgetary control
	Liaising with internal and external stakeholders
	Drive continuous improvement across accounting controls and processes
	Liaise with other non-finance departments.
	Ad hoc support to the Finance Manager.


Education, Experience &amp; Skills


	Minimum of BSc in Accounting
	2- 5 years of core experience in accounting
	First Degree must be in Accounting
	Certified member of ICAN/ACCA
	Excellent strategic planning skills
	Ability to work independently and highly meticulous.
	Good working knowledge of Microsoft Excel, Quickbooks
	Knowledge of Quickbooks, Oracle Financials or any other financial software


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly gross.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their &nbsp;CV and cover letter to: hr@intersectconsortium.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.&nbsp;",

Accounts / Admin Officer Job at Intersect Consortium




        
    

        
        Intersect Consortium is a group of organizations primarily working in the mental health and addiction space. Our members understand the growing need for mental health services and products in Africa and continually work to provide awareness, education, treatment, and support to individuals, companies, families, and society at large. 

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Accounts / Admin Officer

Job Location: Makurdi, Benue
Employment Type: Full-time

Roles and Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Assist the Finance team in maintaining the accounting systems, processes, and procedures
	Ensure financial records meet regulations and Tax Compliance
	Support year-end audit process and financial accounting work
	Deliver timely and high-quality month-end management accounts including a KPI pack.
	Produce weekly financial management information promptly as required by senior management.
	Maintain and reconcile fixed asset registers, prepayments, accruals, and other accounting schedules.
	Bank reconciliations, monitoring petty cash, foreign cash, and credit cards, including reconciliations
	Preparation and submission of monthly VAT, withholding tax, Pension, and other statutory returns.
	Monthly payroll
	Provide transactional support for purchase and sales ledger when required
	Debt control and management
	Budgeting and budgetary control
	Liaising with internal and external stakeholders
	Drive continuous improvement across accounting controls and processes
	Liaise with other non-finance departments.
	Ad hoc support to the Finance Manager.


Education, Experience & Skills


	Minimum of BSc in Accounting
	2- 5 years of core experience in accounting
	First Degree must be in Accounting
	Certified member of ICAN/ACCA
	Excellent strategic planning skills
	Ability to work independently and highly meticulous.
	Good working knowledge of Microsoft Excel, Quickbooks
	Knowledge of Quickbooks, Oracle Financials or any other financial software


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 monthly gross.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their  CV and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Videographer / Video Editor",
  "description": "Pella Group - We&#39;re into real estate development, metal &amp; stainless steel, aluminium &amp; glass works founded in 2006 and headquartered in Lagos, Nigeria. The company specializes in real estate development, property investment, facility management, construction, and architectural finishing solutions. Through its subsidiaries, Pella Homes and Pella Global Services, it delivers residential and commercial property development, metal fabrication, aluminium and glass works, stainless steel installations, automated gates, and other building finishing services. Pella Group serves individual homeowners, businesses, and property developers, with a focus on quality, professionalism, innovation, and customer satisfaction.&nbsp;&nbsp;

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Videographer / Video Editor

Job Location: Igbo Efon, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Shoot and edit videos for digital platforms
	Create reels, commercials, interviews, and property videos
	Handle camera, lighting, and audio equipment
	Add motion graphics, captions, colour grading, and sound design
	Work with the marketing team on campaigns

Videographer / Video Editor Job at Pella Group




        
    

        
        Pella Group - We're into real estate development, metal & stainless steel, aluminium & glass works founded in 2006 and headquartered in Lagos, Nigeria. The company specializes in real estate development, property investment, facility management, construction, and architectural finishing solutions. Through its subsidiaries, Pella Homes and Pella Global Services, it delivers residential and commercial property development, metal fabrication, aluminium and glass works, stainless steel installations, automated gates, and other building finishing services. Pella Group serves individual homeowners, businesses, and property developers, with a focus on quality, professionalism, innovation, and customer satisfaction.  
     

            
    



We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Videographer / Video Editor

Job Location: Igbo Efon, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Shoot and edit videos for digital platforms
	Create reels, commercials, interviews, and property videos
	Handle camera, lighting, and audio equipment
	Add motion graphics, captions, colour grading, and sound design
	Work with the marketing team on campaigns
	Organise video assets and maintain brand consistency.


Requirements


	2+ years of experience in videography/video editing
	Proficiency in Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, or similar
	Strong storytelling, cinematography, and editing skills
	Good knowledge of lighting and audio.


Method of Application
